title: realistic drops
description: Makes mob loot tables more realistic like creepers dropping grass and tnt to skeletons dropping 206 bones
body:
realistic drops is designed fr mob drops to be more realistic, currently there are 5+ mobs that have been changed:

- zombie
- skeleton
- creeper
- spider
- enderman
  
These changes range from dropping 206 bones for zombies and skeletons, to making endermen drop both of their eyes
